pages.text: $(o)"Mountains do not move, but mountains can be read."$()$(br2)$(#228822)Earthshapers$() do not wrestle the land — they listen, then ask it to cooperate.

pages.title: Creed
pages.text: $(l)Earthshaper$()'s three foundations:$(br2)1. $(l)Stone has rhythm$()$(br)2. $(l)Leylines have will$()$(br)3. $(l)We coexist with the land, not above it$()$(br2)Primary element: $(l)Earth$(); minor affinities: $(l)Nature$(), $(l)Blood$().

pages.title: History
pages.text: Began as the $(l)Old Miners' Conclave$(). When they discovered the "blood-tie" between ore and leyline, they elevated from miners to mages.$(br2)Modern Earthshapers keep the artisan tradition — most also build, mine, and farm. The most "grounded" branch of the entire civilization.
